case_title: ARTHUR ALLIONE VS. ALL GREEN ELECTRONICS RECYCLING LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLIONE, ARTHUR AS TO DEFENDANT ALL GREEN ELECTRONICS RECYCLING LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLIONE, ARTHUR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALL GREEN ELECTRONICS RECYCLING LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $6,113.47 PRINCIPAL, $17.43 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,355.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
